allow: Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; cd Tests/Statistics_Functions/Stats_functions; try, run\('test_bernstd.m'\); disp\('PASS test_bernstd'\); catch e, fprintf\('FAIL test_bernstd: %s\\n', e.message\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; try, run\('Tests/Atlases/test_getBrainRegionNames.m'\); fprintf\('\\nSENT_PASS\\n'\); catch e, fprintf\('\\nSENT_FAIL %s\\n', e.message\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; try, x=imgload\('fullmean'\); fprintf\('OK size %s\\n', mat2str\(size\(x\)\)\); catch e, fprintf\('ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; MNIbrain=imgload\('MNIbrain.nii.gz'\); MNIbrain=MNIbrain/max\(MNIbrain\(:\)\); try, overlay_brain3_dep\([30,40,50], [], {MNIbrain>0.8}, 'red', 0.6, 4\); disp\('OKDEP'\); catch e, fprintf\('ERR %s \(line via %s\)\\n', e.message, e.stack\(1\).name\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; srf=loadsrf\('fs5','sphere'\); disp\(fieldnames\(srf\)\); if isfield\(srf,'lh'\); disp\('--lh fields--'\); disp\(fieldnames\(srf.lh\)\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; srf=loadsrf\('fs5','sphere'\); try, n=srf_fwhm2niters\(8, srf.lh\); fprintf\('OK niters=%g\\n', n\); catch e, fprintf\('ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")
Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; im=imgload\('MNImask'\); fprintf\('imgload OK, size=%s, class=%s\\n', mat2str\(size\(im\)\), class\(im\)\);")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; brain=double\(imgload\('MNImask'\)\); mask=imgload\('MNImask'\); try, [plane,clim]=brainmove\(brain,[0,0,20],mask\); fprintf\('brainmove OK plane=%s\\n', mat2str\(size\(plane\)\)\); catch e, fprintf\('ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")
Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; try, x=loadsubs\(1, pwd, 0\); disp\('LOADSUBS_OK'\); catch e, fprintf\('LOADSUBS_ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; MNImask=imgload\('MNImask'\); mask2D=MNImask\(:,:,50\); data=randn\(size\(mask2D\)\); try, viewdata\(data, mask2D\); disp\('VD_OK'\); catch e, fprintf\('VD_ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")

Bash(/Applications/MATLAB_R2024b.app/bin/matlab -batch "addSB2path; close all force; pvals=rand\(10,10\); mask=true\(10,10\); try, ri=imBH\(pvals,mask\); fprintf\('IMBH_OK n=%d\\n', numel\(ri\)\); catch e, fprintf\('IMBH_ERR %s\\n', e.message\); end")
